title: 目標達成の後に・儚くも強く輝く夢！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to my training arc, I've made huge strides!
But I have to take care of myself if I want to run in
hot-blooded races, so I head to the infirmary to
deal with my nails.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And who do I find there but Ardan! She's running
in the same year as me, and it seems she's at the
infirmary for a breather.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We talk, and she tells me she doesn't want to be
seen as merely the incredible Mejiro Ramonu's
little sister. She wants to leave her own mark and
shine with her own light!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Her passion and determination toward that dream
burn so bright, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I start burning up too! I'm so inspired by
everyone's dedication toward their dreams! I've
got to work just as hard so I can make my own
dreams come true!
